title: The Brew Shop - Weekly Email Update
contentHtml:
Hey Brew Shop Fam!
Here's an update of what's happening this week - from new beer drops, wine reviews, our current tap list, to upcoming tastings, and more. 

Join us this Friday from 5-7 PM as we welcome Union Craft Brewing for our free tasting! Gina will be here to pour a selection of Baltimore’s finest. Scroll down to see our full tasting line-up for June.

🚨 CLAG drop!!
• Soup and Destroy DIPA with Citra, Simcoe & Nelson
• I Love the Smell of Mosaic in the Morning DIPA

🌞 Foam knows hops
• Tasman Sun New Zealand Pilsner with Nelson Sauvin, Motueka & Rakau
• Long Distance Driver West Coast Pale Ale
• Dead Flowers IPA with Riwaka & Southern Cross
• Built to Spill DIPA with Galaxy & Citra
• Multitude of Drops DIPA with Nelson Sauvin, Motueka, Pacifica & Pacific Jade

• German Pilsner
• Primitive Reflex West Coast Pale Ale with Simcoe, Mosaic & Amarillo

• Pigeon of the Peak English IPA with East Kent Golding, Columbus & Wolf

😸 East vs West with Lost Generation

• Dreadful Beauty Hazy DIPA with Nectaron & Citra

🧃 All the juice from Great Notion

🍕 Hop Butcher making me hungry

🧟 From the West Coast to Your Doorstep

•  Mason Suds West Coast IPA
• Beer Zombies Let Sleeping Zombies Lie DDH West Coast DIPA with Trident, Eureka Salvo, Idaho 7 CGX, Vista CGX & Citra Abstrax

🙌 Equilibrium = yum
• Juice = Juice DIPA
• Harmonic Oscillation IPA with Citra, Incognito, Enigma, Riwaka & Galaxy
• Dream Wave Fluctuation DIPA with Galaxy & Citra - collab with Other Half

Local lighter fare
• Atlas Half Street Hefeweizen
• Solace Adirondack Pils

• Cigar City Sumo Splash Rice Lager with Watermelon

• Union Craft Double Duckpin DIPA with Cascade, Columbus, Galaxy & Mosaic

Summer sips for the whole fam
• Wyndridge Mojito Cider
• Zero Gravity Jaws Czech Pilsner
• Maplewood Juice Jorts Pale Ale with Citra, Azacca & El Dorado

The Veil dropping from Richmond

• We Ded Mon Triple IPA with Citra

🌊 Easy going from Brothers
• Drift Session IPA with Citra
• Cerveza Hermanos with Lime Mexican Lager

Benchtop boozin'
• Idaho7 Machine Hazy IPA
• King of F English Pale Ale with Sonnet
• Partial Coalescence Cream Ale with Bloody Butcher Corn

Perfect for the sweating season: Busch Light Lime

Hops on hops withAdroit Theory
• Abandon All Hope Hazy DIPA DDH with Citra, Motueka & El Dorado
• God is an American Hazy TIPA DDH with Riwaka, Nelson Sauvin & Citra

👊 Ocelot is ready to supply your watch party

• Polvo Pils Czech Pilsner

• Gorgeous & Alone IPA with Citra, Simcoe & Mosaic

• Waves of Light IPA with Citra & Peacharine

🚨A new Hopslam variant fromBell’s?! Yes please!

*expected Friday*

🙌 Y’all crushed the last Melvin Method IPA - new brew incoming!

• Method Krush West Coast IPA with Krush hops

Finback Social Fabric Hazy DIPA

Alternate Ending Royal Rug German Pilsner

New wines in the door!

Pillitteri Estate Vidal Icewine: If you've never had one, Icewine is produced from grapes left to naturally freeze on the vine and pressed while frozen, concentrating the sugars and flavors into an intensely aromatic dessert wine! This Canadian Icewine showcases the vintage's naturally vibrant acidity, balancing its rich sweetness with freshness and elegance. Aromas of stone fruit and wildflower honey lead into a luscious palate layered with pineapple and orange peel.

 

Pillitteri Estate Vidal Icewine: If you've never had one, Icewine is produced from grapes left to naturally freeze on the vine and pressed while frozen, concentrating the sugars and flavors into an intensely aromatic dessert wine! This Canadian Icewine showcases the vintage's naturally vibrant acidity, balancing its rich sweetness with freshness and elegance. Aromas of stone fruit and wildflower honey lead into a luscious palate layered with pineapple and orange peel.

It's officially pool season! I know pool season started weeks ago for some of you, but I made my first trip to the pool this past weekend - along with what felt like half the county. I saw many of you there at KoC. (Yes, that was me having a splash fight with Beth's 9-year-old.) Those of you who are pool veterans know that pre-loading your Owala is key to optimizing your pool experience. And we've got an entire wall of crispy white wines just waiting and ready to hit the pool with you.

Last week, we debuted Basa Lore Igartzeta Txakoli on our shelves and let me tell you - this hit perfectly last weekend in the heat. As you may know, Txakoli is best known for being poured in a celebratory arc from a pitcher. It's also known for being bone dry, thirst quenchingly acidic, and slightly sparkling. Basa Lore Igartzeta is all of those things plus notes of green apple, fresh flowers, and crisp salinity. That touch of sparkling is perfect to emphasize the freshness and, frankly, fun of this wine. So grab a bottle of Txakoli and get locked and loaded for your next pool outing, or neighborhood gathering, or patio night.

This week’s writeup is brought to you by Julie.

June Tasting Events coming your way!

Thanks for your business! See you soon, Beth, Julie & Aidan and the entire Brew Crew
